mapper.insert: INSERT INTO app_user (username, email, password_hash, locale, role, email_verified, created_by) VALUES (#{username}, #{email}, #{passwordHash}, #{locale}, #{role}, #{emailVerified}, 'system')
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM app_user WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM app_user WHERE username = #{username} AND deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM app_user WHERE email = #{email} AND deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM app_user WHERE (username = #{account} OR email = #{account}) AND deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM app_user WHERE username = #{username} AND deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM app_user WHERE email = #{email} AND deleted = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE app_user SET password_hash = #{hash}, updated_by = 'self' WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE app_user SET locale = #{locale}, updated_by = 'self' WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM app_user WHERE role = #{role} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY id LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM app_user WHERE deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM app_user WHERE deleted = 0 AND created_at >= #{since}
SELECT DATE(created_at) AS day, COUNT(*) AS count FROM app_user WHERE deleted = 0 AND created_at >= #{since} GROUP BY DATE(created_at) ORDER BY day
